nasb.text: Slanderous men have been in you for the purpose of shedding blood, and in you they have eaten at the mountain shrines. In your midst they have committed acts of lewdness.

esv.text: There are men in you who slander to shed blood, and people in you who eat on the mountains; they commit lewdness in your midst.

cnv.text: 在你裡面有好讒謗的人，他們要流人的血；在你的山上吃祭肉；又在你中間行淫亂的事。

ccb.text: 在你这城中，有人好诽谤、杀人流血，有人在山上吃祭物，有人淫乱，
